2019, Jun 06

App Icon Generator

As a developer, have you ever been in a situation where you needed to convert your app icons to the correct sizes for iOS and Android platforms? If yes, you know how tedious and time-consuming it can be to manually resize images. However, now there’s a solution that can save you time and effort - a mac app that can automatically resize your app icons to the correct sizes!

With this mac app, you no longer need to spend hours resizing images manually. All you need to do is drag and drop your app icons into the application window, and the software takes care of the rest. This app is designed specifically to create the correct sizes for iOS and Android platforms, so you can rest assured that your app icons will be in the correct format.

One of the biggest advantages of using this mac app is that it’s incredibly easy to use. You don’t need any technical expertise or prior experience with image resizing tools. All you need to do is follow a few simple steps, and you’ll have your app icons in the correct format in no time.

Here’s how you can use this mac app to resize your app icons:

Step 1: Launch the app on your mac device.

Step 2: Drag and drop your app icons into the application window.

Step 3: Wait for a few seconds while the app resizes your images to the correct format.

Step 4: Once the resizing process is complete, you can access the resized images from the output folder.

That’s it! In just four simple steps, you can have your app icons resized to the correct format. This mac app saves you a lot of time and effort, allowing you to focus on other important aspects of your app development.

Not only is this mac app easy to use, but it’s also incredibly efficient. It uses advanced algorithms to resize your app icons, ensuring that they’re of the highest quality. You can trust this app to deliver high-quality images every time.
